title: Heap buffer overflow on SQL input
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1 (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE test2 (ref_id INTEGER, amount REAL, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES test1(id));
INSERT INTO test2 (ref_id, amount) VALUES (1, 100.0), (2, NULL), (3, 200.5);
SELECT t1.id, t1.value, t2.amount FROM test1 t1 LEFT JOIN test2 t2 ON t1.id = t2.ref_id WHERE t2.amount IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t1.created_at DESC;
